hooks.command: printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"UserPromptSubmit","additionalContext":"SPEC CHECK: Before starting this task, check the specs/ folder. If a relevant spec exists, confirm it covers the change. If no spec exists, ask the user: should I write a spec first? Skip only for pure bug fixes or CSS-only tweaks."}}'

printf '{"systemMessage":"README check: if anything changed this session (features, structure, flow, behaviour, config), update README.md now. If no update is needed, tell the user why in one line."}'

printf '{"systemMessage":"i18n check: if any user-facing strings were added or changed - (1) both T.en and T.fr keys must exist in data.js, (2) always use t(key) in JS never hardcode display strings, (3) dynamic content must use S.lang with fallback to .en. Fix any violations before finishing."}'
